3030632977.seller_name: Baby Essentials by First Few Years
3030632977.detail_text: Infant Oral Hygiene Targets dental health issues in infants by eliminating common problems such as milk build-up and tongue film. The toothbrush also offers a gentle massage for teething relief and maintains oral cleanliness. Superior Material Constructed with 100% medical-grade skim gauze for the brush head, it ensures a gentle and effective cleaning. The robust paper handle adds to the durability, while the 3D wave design thoroughly cleans all areas of the mouth. It is also free from any fluorescent brighteners and is taste-neutral. Secure & Reliable Construction Features a double-stitched fastening method for enhanced security during use, making it a reliable choice for infant tongue cleaning. Individually Sealed for Hygiene Each oral cleaning tool is individually vacuum-sealed for single use, ensuring it is sterile and ready for immediate use. It can be used as is or softened with warm water at 30°C. Regular cleaning of your infant's tongue and gums is advised, even in the absence of teeth. Initial Toothbrush for Infants Designed for infants from birth to 36 months, this toothbrush introduces your child to oral hygiene early on, setting the foundation for healthy dental habits. ✓ Designed for infants from Birth to 36 Months ✓ Medical-grade sterilized gauze ✓ Soft and hygienic for baby's gums ✓ 30pcs per box, Individually packed ✓ 3D wave brush head ensure 360° cleaning ✓ Gentle and effective tongue cleaning ✓ No fluoride or whitening agent ✓ Ergonomic, double-stitched design for safe and thorough cleaning How to use 1. Unpack and use directly. 2. For newborns, dip in lukemarm water ( 3. Gently clean baby's mouth, tongue and teeth. 4. Discard the swab after use. Note: Please allow 5% difference due to manual measurement. Do not reuse product. Store in a cool and dry area Away from heat and direct sunlight. This product is not a toy. Do not leave children unsupervised with the product. Keep out of reach of children.

Targets dental health issues in infants by eliminating common problems such as milk build-up and tongue film. The toothbrush also offers a gentle massage for teething relief and maintains oral cleanliness.

Superior Material

Constructed with 100% medical-grade skim gauze for the brush head, it ensures a gentle and effective cleaning. The robust paper handle adds to the durability, while the 3D wave design thoroughly cleans all areas of the mouth. It is also free from any fluorescent brighteners and is taste-neutral.

Secure & Reliable Construction

Features a double-stitched fastening method for enhanced security during use, making it a reliable choice for infant tongue cleaning.

Individually Sealed for Hygiene

Each oral cleaning tool is individually vacuum-sealed for single use, ensuring it is sterile and ready for immediate use. It can be used as is or softened with warm water at 30°C. Regular cleaning of your infant's tongue and gums is advised, even in the absence of teeth.

Initial Toothbrush for Infants

Designed for infants from birth to 36 months, this toothbrush introduces your child to oral hygiene early on, setting the foundation for healthy dental habits.

✓ Designed for infants from Birth to 36 Months

✓ Medical-grade sterilized gauze

✓ Soft and hygienic for baby's gums

✓ 30pcs per box, Individually packed

✓ 3D wave brush head ensure 360° cleaning

✓ Gentle and effective tongue cleaning

✓ No fluoride or whitening agent

✓ Ergonomic, double-stitched design for safe and thorough cleaning

How to use

1. Unpack and use directly.

2. For newborns, dip in lukemarm water (<30°C) before using.

3. Gently clean baby's mouth, tongue and teeth.

4. Discard the swab after use.

Note: Please allow 5% difference due to manual measurement.

Do not reuse product.

Store in a cool and dry area

Away from heat and direct sunlight.

This product is not a toy.

Do not leave children unsupervised with the product.

Keep out of reach of children.

2107576839.detail_text: **Please refer to individual option images for a clearer understanding of what will be received.** Dr. Brown's Infant-to-Toddler/Toddler Training Toothbrush is a super-soft and safe toothbrush for baby’s first teeth. Teach good dental hygiene with this gentle toothbrush. The perfect training toothbrush. Super-soft and safe for baby’s first teeth Flexible body is gentle on sensitive gums Comfort-grip handle is easy for little hands to hold Gentle on sensitive gums Stable base keeps brush upright Shaped like an elephant to help make tooth brushing time fun For 0 to 3 Years (Training Toothbrush): Pink Elephant/Blue Elephant/Giraffe Design For 1-4 Years: Crocodile/Flamingo/Dinosaur/Otter/ToothScrubber design Dr. Brown's Natural Baby Toothpaste is a fluoride-free toothpaste that provides a natural way to clean your little one’s teeth and gums. Help your infant learn good dental hygiene by gently and safely brushing new teeth and gums with this. Floride-Free & Safe to Swallow No artificial colors or preservatives Features real pear and apple flavor Promotes a lifetime of good brushing skills Ingredients: Glycerin, Aqua (Water), Xylitol, Propanediol, Sorbitol, Pectin, Xanthum Gum, Silica, Sorbic Acid, Aroma (Flavor), Calcium Lactate Recommended for babies 0-3 years. Instructions for use (toothbrush) Clean toothbrush before and after each use with warm water. Inspect toothbrush before and after each use and discard if worn or damaged. Do not boil, steam or microwave sterilize. Do not put in the dishwasher. Dentists recommend replacing your toothbrush every 3 months. Instructions for use (toothpaste) Squeeze a pea-sized amount of toothpaste onto an extra-soft bristled brush. Use a small circular motion on teeth and gums. For best results, be sure to brush your baby’s teeth at least twice a day – preferably morning and at bedtime. For your child’s safety and health WARNING! Tooth-brushing should be supervised by an adult. Do not let your young child walk or crawl with the toothbrush in his/her hand or mouth. Do not leave child unattended with toothbrush or toothpaste. To prevent possible choking hazard, inspect toothbrush before first use. Replace if bristles become loose, have cracks, or show other signs of excessive wear. • The Perfect Training Toothbrush • Helps to establish good oral hygiene habits that will last a lifetime. • Super-Soft And Safe For Baby’s First Teeth • The perfect-sized toothbrush for your little one’s teeth and gums. • Flexible Body Is Gentle On Sensitive Gums • Makes it easier to brush when infants are teething or experiencing gum discomfort. • Comfort-Grip Handle Is Easy For Little Hands To Hold Helps your child get a comfortable grip during the tooth-brushing process.
2107576839.detail_html:
**Please refer to individual option images for a clearer understanding of what will be received.**

Dr. Brown's Infant-to-Toddler/Toddler Training Toothbrush is a super-soft and safe toothbrush for baby’s first teeth. Teach good dental hygiene with this gentle toothbrush. The perfect training toothbrush.

  • Super-soft and safe for baby’s first teeth
  • Flexible body is gentle on sensitive gums
  • Comfort-grip handle is easy for little hands to hold
  • Gentle on sensitive gums
  • Stable base keeps brush upright
  • Shaped like an elephant to help make tooth brushing time fun

For 0 to 3 Years (Training Toothbrush): Pink Elephant/Blue Elephant/Giraffe Design

For 1-4 Years: Crocodile/Flamingo/Dinosaur/Otter/ToothScrubber design

Dr. Brown's Natural Baby Toothpaste is a fluoride-free toothpaste that provides a natural way to clean your little one’s teeth and gums. Help your infant learn good dental hygiene by gently and safely brushing new teeth and gums with this.

  • Floride-Free & Safe to Swallow
  • No artificial colors or preservatives
  • Features real pear and apple flavor
  • Promotes a lifetime of good brushing skills
  • Ingredients: Glycerin, Aqua (Water), Xylitol, Propanediol, Sorbitol, Pectin, Xanthum Gum, Silica, Sorbic Acid, Aroma (Flavor), Calcium Lactate

Recommended for babies 0-3 years.

Instructions for use (toothbrush)

Clean toothbrush before and after each use with warm water. Inspect toothbrush before and after each use and discard if worn or damaged. Do not boil, steam or microwave sterilize. Do not put in the dishwasher. Dentists recommend replacing your toothbrush every 3 months.

Instructions for use (toothpaste)

Squeeze a pea-sized amount of toothpaste onto an extra-soft bristled brush. Use a small circular motion on teeth and gums. For best results, be sure to brush your baby’s teeth at least twice a day – preferably morning and at bedtime.

For your child’s safety and health WARNING!

Tooth-brushing should be supervised by an adult. Do not let your young child walk or crawl with the toothbrush in his/her hand or mouth. Do not leave child unattended with toothbrush or toothpaste. To prevent possible choking hazard, inspect toothbrush before first use. Replace if bristles become loose, have cracks, or show other signs of excessive wear.

• The Perfect Training Toothbrush

• Helps to establish good oral hygiene habits that will last a lifetime.

• Super-Soft And Safe For Baby’s First Teeth

• The perfect-sized toothbrush for your little one’s teeth and gums.

• Flexible Body Is Gentle On Sensitive Gums

• Makes it easier to brush when infants are teething or experiencing gum discomfort.

• Comfort-Grip Handle Is Easy For Little Hands To Hold

Helps your child get a comfortable grip during the tooth-brushing process.

aiTexts: Dr Brown's Infant-to-Toddler Toothbrush and Toothpaste set is designed for gentle oral care from 0-3 years.
Features super-soft nylon bristles and a flexible body that protect sensitive gums, with a comfort-grip handle sized for little hands.
The stable base keeps the brush upright to maintain hygiene, while fun animal shapes make brushing enjoyable.
The fluoride-free toothpaste contains real pear and apple flavor without artificial colors or preservatives, safe to swallow and ideal for daily use.
This set promotes good brushing habits with safe, natural ingredients perfect for early oral care.

brand.name: Dr. Brown's
brand.suggestion: More Baby Personal Care from Dr. Brown's

product.desc:
**Please refer to individual option images for a clearer understanding of what will be received.**

Dr. Brown's Infant-to-Toddler/Toddler Training Toothbrush is a super-soft and safe toothbrush for baby’s first teeth. Teach good dental hygiene with this gentle toothbrush. The perfect training toothbrush.

  • Super-soft and safe for baby’s first teeth
  • Flexible body is gentle on sensitive gums
  • Comfort-grip handle is easy for little hands to hold
  • Gentle on sensitive gums
  • Stable base keeps brush upright
  • Shaped like an elephant to help make tooth brushing time fun

For 0 to 3 Years (Training Toothbrush): Pink Elephant/Blue Elephant/Giraffe Design

For 1-4 Years: Crocodile/Flamingo/Dinosaur/Otter/ToothScrubber design

Dr. Brown's Natural Baby Toothpaste is a fluoride-free toothpaste that provides a natural way to clean your little one’s teeth and gums. Help your infant learn good dental hygiene by gently and safely brushing new teeth and gums with this.

  • Floride-Free & Safe to Swallow
  • No artificial colors or preservatives
  • Features real pear and apple flavor
  • Promotes a lifetime of good brushing skills
  • Ingredients: Glycerin, Aqua (Water), Xylitol, Propanediol, Sorbitol, Pectin, Xanthum Gum, Silica, Sorbic Acid, Aroma (Flavor), Calcium Lactate

Recommended for babies 0-3 years.

Instructions for use (toothbrush)

Clean toothbrush before and after each use with warm water. Inspect toothbrush before and after each use and discard if worn or damaged. Do not boil, steam or microwave sterilize. Do not put in the dishwasher. Dentists recommend replacing your toothbrush every 3 months.

Instructions for use (toothpaste)

Squeeze a pea-sized amount of toothpaste onto an extra-soft bristled brush. Use a small circular motion on teeth and gums. For best results, be sure to brush your baby’s teeth at least twice a day – preferably morning and at bedtime.

For your child’s safety and health WARNING!

Tooth-brushing should be supervised by an adult. Do not let your young child walk or crawl with the toothbrush in his/her hand or mouth. Do not leave child unattended with toothbrush or toothpaste. To prevent possible choking hazard, inspect toothbrush before first use. Replace if bristles become loose, have cracks, or show other signs of excessive wear.

• The Perfect Training Toothbrush

• Helps to establish good oral hygiene habits that will last a lifetime.

• Super-Soft And Safe For Baby’s First Teeth

• The perfect-sized toothbrush for your little one’s teeth and gums.

• Flexible Body Is Gentle On Sensitive Gums

• Makes it easier to brush when infants are teething or experiencing gum discomfort.

• Comfort-Grip Handle Is Easy For Little Hands To Hold

Helps your child get a comfortable grip during the tooth-brushing process.

page_json.name: Dr Brown's Infant-to-Toddler/Toddler Toothbrush & Toothpaste
page_json.description: Dr Brown s. Electric Toothbrush Kids: U00a0with a super-strong brush head, it's an ideal gift for your child. Jack N Jill Toothpaste: Add a few drops of toothpaste to your little one's teeth, such as lips, fingers. Baby Toothbrush 1 Year: Combines toothbrush and toothbrush 1 year old to give your baby the best use of toothbrush. Newborn Tongue Cleaner: Dr browns double the gums of your baby's tongue. Toothpaste for Baby: Dr browns's toothpaste is a great way to develop your little teeth. Dr Brown's Infant-to-Toddler Toothbrush/Toothpaste. Super-soft and safe for baby s first teeth. Flexible body is gentle on sensitive gums. Comfort-grip handle is easy for little hands to hold. Gentle on sensitive gums. Stable base keeps brush upright. Fun shaped to help make tooth brushing time fun. Floride-Free Safe to Swallow No artificial colors or preservatives. Features real pear and apple flavor. Promotes a lifetime of good brushing skills

13716922052.title: PROTEFIX | Soft Bristle Antimicrobial Baby Oral Care Set
13716922052.detail_text: Dinosaur Theme Featuring a fun dinosaur theme, this toothbrush is sure to capture the attention of young children, encouraging them to brush their teeth regularly. Baby-Safe Formula The accompanying toothpaste is specially formulated for babies, ensuring it is safe and gentle for their developing teeth. Easy to Use With its ergonomic handle, this toothbrush is easy for young children to hold and use, promoting good oral hygiene habits from a young age. Age-appropriate Design Specifically designed for children aged 0-3, this toothbrush features soft bristles that are gentle on young gums and teeth. Antibacterial Properties The toothbrush's soft bristles are treated with antibacterial properties, helping to keep your child's mouth clean and healthy.
13716922052.detail_html:
Dinosaur Theme



Featuring a fun dinosaur theme, this toothbrush is sure to capture the attention of young children, encouraging them to brush their teeth regularly.






Baby-Safe Formula



The accompanying toothpaste is specially formulated for babies, ensuring it is safe and gentle for their developing teeth.






Easy to Use



With its ergonomic handle, this toothbrush is easy for young children to hold and use, promoting good oral hygiene habits from a young age.






Age-appropriate Design



Specifically designed for children aged 0-3, this toothbrush features soft bristles that are gentle on young gums and teeth.






Antibacterial Properties



The toothbrush's soft bristles are treated with antibacterial properties, helping to keep your child's mouth clean and healthy.

589566029.title: Pigeon Baby Tooth & Gum Wipes Natural Flavour 20s
589566029.detail_text: Start healthy oral care early with Pigeon Baby Tooth & Gum Wipes. Specially formulated for babies 0 months onwards with 100% food-grade ingredients, these wipes are gentle, safe and help keep your baby's teeth, gums and tongue clean and healthy. • Co-developed with Pediatric Dentist • 100% Food Grade Ingredients • Ultra-Flexible Design Wipes • Gently cleans baby’s teeth, gums and tongue • No Alcohol, Colouring and Preservatives • 20 Pcs. of sterile wipes individually packed • Suitable for 0M+ Product Warnings: Use wipes immediately after opening the sachet. Do not reuse. Do not use on infected tooth/gums. In the event of unexpected rash or redness, stop using immediately and consult your doctor. Keep out of reach of babies. Adult supervision is required to prevent accidental swallowing. Do not flush wipes down the toilet. Store at room temperature. This product is made with 100% natural cotton. Small dark specks or plant fibers may occasionally appear as part of the natural cotton fabric. These are safe and naturally occurring. Ingredients: Aqua, Propylene Glycol, Xylitol, Sodium Citrate, Citric Acid
589566029.detail_html:
Start healthy oral care early with Pigeon Baby Tooth & Gum Wipes. Specially formulated for babies 0 months onwards with 100% food-grade ingredients, these wipes are gentle, safe and help keep your baby's teeth, gums and tongue clean and healthy.

3032699729.detail_text: NUK Oral Wipes - 25 Sachet/ Box NUK Oral cleansing begins even before the baby’s teeth start to erupt. Wipe the gum with NUK Oral Wipes after each feed. This cleans the mouth to reduce the growth of bacteria and introduces your child to the oral cleaning procedure early. As it is made of exceptionally soft material, it does not irritate the baby’s mouth. It is widely used in removing mucous, releasing phlegm or applying a solution to any area of the oral cavity. It helps reduce the breeding of bacteria in the mouth while maintaining oral hygiene for the baby. The wipe is individually air-tight sealed, hygienic and convenient to carry around. Features and Benefits NUK Oral Wipe is thoroughly sterilised by autoclaving machines at 115° C Only purified water is used, contains no preservatives or chemicals Wide range of use in removing mucus, releasing phlegm or applying a solution to any area of the oral cavity Individually air-tight sealed, hygienic and convenient to carry Made In Japan How to clean your baby's oral cavity Sit your baby on your lap, facing to one side. Support its head with your arm and hand. Use the index finger or thumb of your arm and hand. Use the index finger or thumb of your supporting hand to open its mouth and support its lower jaw. Wrap NUK Oral Wipe around the index finger of your other hand. Wipe the roof of the mouth, tongue and gums.
3032699729.detail_html:
NUK Oral Wipes - 25 Sachet/ Box

NUK Oral cleansing begins even before the baby’s teeth start to erupt. Wipe the gum with NUK Oral Wipes after each feed. This cleans the mouth to reduce the growth of bacteria and introduces your child to the oral cleaning procedure early.


As it is made of exceptionally soft material, it does not irritate the baby’s mouth. It is widely used in removing mucous, releasing phlegm or applying a solution to any area of the oral cavity. It helps reduce the breeding of bacteria in the mouth while maintaining oral hygiene for the baby. The wipe is individually air-tight sealed, hygienic and convenient to carry around.


Features and Benefits

  • NUK Oral Wipe is thoroughly sterilised by autoclaving machines at 115° C
  • Only purified water is used, contains no preservatives or chemicals
  • Wide range of use in removing mucus, releasing phlegm or applying a solution to any area of the oral cavity
  • Individually air-tight sealed, hygienic and convenient to carry
  • Made In Japan


How to clean your baby's oral cavity

  1. Sit your baby on your lap, facing to one side.
  2. Support its head with your arm and hand.
  3. Use the index finger or thumb of your arm and hand.
  4. Use the index finger or thumb of your supporting hand to open its mouth and support its lower jaw.
  5. Wrap NUK Oral Wipe around the index finger of your other hand.
  6. Wipe the roof of the mouth, tongue and gums.
